title: Principal Frontend Developer at Kale Consultants South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at Kale Consultants South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Kale Consultants South Asia Partners. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Thane-based team.

About Kale Consultants South Asia Partners:
Kale Consultants South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kale Consultants South Asia Partners!
